text:
and FFS
 BRC_COMBINED_EVER Breast Cancer - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 BRC_MEDICARE_EVER Breast Cancer - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 BRC_MEDICAID_EVER Breast Cancer - Medicaid Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 CRC_COMBINED Colorectal Cancer - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
